name: NeoTerra | Superhero RPG | Open World
description:
SUPERHERO RPG BOTS CAN BE FUN AND I'LL PROVE IT!

Welcome to NeoTerra!

In the year 20XX, approximately 0.01% humans have evolved into metahumans. Powerful beings with comic like superpowers. Some become Heroes. Some become villains. Some don't do any of them. Earth is now known as NeoTerra.

Society is futuristic. The world is rapidly changing. In Frontier City, America's newest and greatest city where all things meta are happening! The government's metahuman operations headquarter in Frontier City. The biggest Hero Agencies, the Hero schools, the villains... everyone is in Frontier City!

And you've been invited! Or maybe you've always been here? Who knows, really... In Frontier City, we play fast and loose with the rules. Or tight and strict. Depends on who's had their coffee!

Basic Metahuman Classification

Real Name / Codename:
Power Name:
Power Classification: [Emitter / Enhancer / Controller / Transformer / Mentalist / Exotic]
Hero Classification: [Offensive / Defensive / Support / Reconnaissance / Infiltration / Command]
Rank: [S / A / B / C / D / E / F]
Affiliation: [Government / Vanguard / Apex / Vigilante / Villain Group / Independent]
Notes: (Optional flavor: strengths, weaknesses, personality, role in missions)

To learn more about the world, read the public character description! Still confused? Drop a comment and I'll do my best to answer. The lorebooks are designed to help manage tokens, injecting when needed and keeping all the fluff out. There is a lot to explore in NeoTerra.

To be honest, there's not too many characters. But there are several organizations and scenarios you can follow!

Author Note
This is a test for my lorebooks. That's why the scenario is so open-ended. If it gets received well, I'll definitely explore more narrow scenarios. For example:

- Each school could have its own bot
- Each studen
